commands.name: open
commands.summary: Print the material library module discussion file path

commands.name: show
commands.summary: Display the material library module discussion notes

commands.name: search
commands.summary: Search materials by rough text plus exact tag, source, and category filters

args.name: text
args.summary: Rough text to search in material name, description, source, path, category, and body

args.name: --text <text>
args.summary: Explicit rough text search. Can be repeated.

args.name: --tag <tag>
args.summary: Require an exact tag after normalization. Can be repeated.

args.name: --source <source>
args.summary: Require an exact YAML source after normalization. Can be repeated.

args.name: --work <work>
args.summary: Search source/work field by containment. Alias of --source-contains.

args.name: --category <category>
args.summary: Require an exact top-level material category folder after normalization.

args.name: --limit <n>
args.summary: Maximum number of results. Defaults to 20. Use 0 for all.

commands.name: info
commands.summary: List existing material library categories, sources, and tags for precise search

args.name: --section <name>
args.summary: Limit output to categories, sources, tags, tags-by-category, or sources-by-category.

args.name: --category <category>
args.summary: Limit info to one exact category folder.
